description: Enterprise design system with 30 sections covering core design laws, responsive design, visual hierarchy, components, animations, layouts, dark mode, accessibility, performance, typography, icons, interactions, component specs, data visualization, micro-interactions, navigation patterns, advanced forms, content patterns, error handling, accessibility deep dive, performance patterns, platform-specific guidelines, iconography details, system updates/maintenance, animation library patterns, collaborative components, advanced state management, and form builder patterns.
newIn3_0_0: Section 30: Form Builder Patterns with conditional visibility, multi-step wizards, and complex dependencies
73 new form design tokens for step indicators, validation states, and field animations
3 production-ready form examples: basic dynamic, multi-step wizard, advanced dependencies
Complete form builder documentation with 828 lines of comprehensive patterns
localStorage persistence patterns for form state recovery
Field array patterns for reusable form field groups (add/remove)
Enhanced error handling with error summaries and field linking

v2_3_0: Section 27: Animation Library Patterns with reusable animation systems and composition patterns
Section 28: Collaborative Component Patterns with presence, cursors, comments, and roles
Section 29: Advanced State Management UI Patterns with state machines, undo/redo, and optimistic updates
Extended design-tokens.css with animation library and state management tokens
New animation keyframes: slide-in, fade-in, scale-pop, shimmer, pulse
State indicator color tokens: pending, active, completed, error, disabled
Collaboration presence tokens: editing, viewing, away, offline

previousVersions.description: Added Sections 27-29: Animation Library, Collaborative Components, and Advanced State Management
Added Section 26: System Updates & Maintenance with versioning infrastructure
Added 10 new comprehensive sections (16-25) expanding design system
Initial comprehensive design system with 14 foundational sections
